page: Microsoft Azure D2plds_v5 is an ARM-based virtual machine instance belonging to the DPLDSv5 family. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Ampere Altra ARMv8 Neoverse-N1 processor operating at a clock speed of 3.0 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 4.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 2.0 GB memory-per-core ratio, and 77 GB of local SSD storage. The CPU architecture is arm64, with 2 physical cores and a single thread per core, supported by 64 KB L1d cache, 1.0 MB L2 cache, and 32 MB L3 cache.

Benchmark evaluations indicate average single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU tests and single-threaded compression/decompression tasks achieving mid-tier results. However, multi-core and memory-intensive workloads show limitations, with stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core scores falling into the lower performance quartiles. Memory bandwidth tests also demonstrate lower throughput, particularly for large uncached blocks.

This instance offers a cost-efficient entry point for ARM-native development and testing due to its low resource density and budget-friendly hardware profile. It is suitable for lightweight workloads such as basic web serving, single-threaded utility scripts, and minor database operations that do not require high memory capacity or advanced vector extensions.
description: Microsoft Azure D2plds_v5 is an ARM-based virtual machine instance from the DPLDSv5 family, configured with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 4.0 GB of RAM. Powered by a 3.0 GHz Ampere Altra Neoverse-N1 processor, this instance features 77 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage. It operates on the arm64 architecture with a single thread per core and lacks hyperthreading. Performance benchmarks reveal average single-core capabilities in compression and stress tests, though multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics remain in the lower tiers. Lacking advanced vector and matrix extensions, this instance represents a budget-friendly, low-memory option optimized for lightweight workloads. It is best suited for basic web serving, ARM-native software compilation, and simple database operations.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D2plds_v5 is an ARM-based virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated Ampere Neoverse-N1 vCPUs, 4.0 GB of RAM, and 77 GB of local storage, designed for lightweight, cost-efficient workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D2plds_v5 is an ARM-based virtual machine with 2 vCPUs, 4.0 GB of RAM, and 77 GB of local storage for low-memory workloads.
tagline: A budget-friendly, low-memory ARM virtual machine with dedicated vCPUs and local storage for entry-level workloads and testing.
bullet_points: 2 dedicated Ampere Altra Neoverse-N1 ARM vCPUs running at 3.0 GHz
4.0 GB of system memory and 77 GB of local SSD storage
Average single-core performance for compression and basic processing
Cost-efficient hardware profile for ARM-native development and testing
Best suited for lightweight web serving and simple database operations
